cv_text:
SHANTI GIRI
 
9/12 Woids Avenue, Hurstville NSW 2220 | shantigiri2959@gmail.com | 0415 690 003 
 
 
  PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
 
 
Compassionate and motivated Aged Care Support Worker with a Certificate IV in Ageing Support and 120 hours 
of supervised clinical placement in residential aged care. Skilled in personal care, dementia support, palliative 
care, medication administration, and working within multidisciplinary healthcare teams. Currently advancing 
professional expertise through a Master of Professional Accounting at CQ University Sydney. Committed to 
delivering person-centered care that promotes dignity, independence, and well-being for all residents. 
 
 
  CERTIFICATIONS & TRAINING 
 
 
Certificate IV in Ageing Support (CHC43015) April 2026 
Elite Institute and Technology, Australia  
Statement of Attainment — First Aid & CPR April 2026 
NovaCare Institute (RTO Code: 46321)  
 
• Facilitated empowerment of older people, supporting independence and well-being. 
• Competent in administering medications, providing palliative care, and supporting individuals with dementia.  
• Completed modules in coordinating aged care services, delivering individual care plans, and maintaining legal 
and ethical compliance. 
 
 
  CLINICAL PLACEMENT 
 
 
RFBI Concord Community Village 
Aged Care Placement (120 hours) 
Dec 2025 – Feb 2026 
Rhodes, NSW 
• Provided personal care to elderly residents, including individuals with dementia, ensuring safety, comfort, and 
well-being. 
• Assisted with daily living activities including dressing, bathing, feeding, and mobility support, strictly adhering 
to individualized care plans. 
• Collaborated with Registered Nurses and the multidisciplinary healthcare team to administer medications and 
follow care protocols. 
• Monitored residents' health conditions and promptly reported any changes or concerns to the nursing team.  
• Supported residents' independence through social engagement activities and mental health support.  
• Worked efficiently within scheduled time frames, ensuring timely completion of all care tasks.  
 
 
 
 

  WORK EXPERIENCE 
 
 
Akala Motors Private Limited 
Junior Accountant 
Jan 2024 – May 2025 
Pokhara, Nepal 
• Maintained financial records and updated daily transactions accurately. 
• Processed transactions efficiently while maintaining professional client interactions.  
• Assisted in internal and external audits by providing supporting documentation and reports.  
 
Dimeo Cleaning Excellence 
Office Cleaner 
Sydney, Australia 
 
• Maintained cleanliness of office areas including desks, floors, and meeting rooms.  
• Emptied office waste bins and ensured hygienic standards were consistently upheld.  
 
 
  EDUCATION 
 
 
Master of Professional Accounting Jul 2025 – Present 
CQ University, Sydney, Australia  
Bachelor of Business Administration Completed 2021 
Pokhara University, Pokhara, Nepal  
 
• Personal Care & Hygiene Assistance • Dementia & Palliative Care Support 
• Medication Administration Support • Individualized Care Plan Implementation 
• CPR & First Aid Certified • Infection Control & Workplace Safety 
• Patient Observation & Reporting • Multidisciplinary Team Collaboration 
• Time Management & Prioritization • Empathy, Patience & Emotional Resilience 
 
  LANGUAGES 
 
 
English 
Advanced 
Hindi 
Intermediate 
Nepali 
Native 
 
 
  REFERENCES 
 
 
Rajani Bhattarai 
Registered Nurse 
RFBI Concord Community Village 
Ph: 0410 939 651 
Rbhattarai@rfbi.com.au 
Sabitri Giri Tiwari 
Registered Nurse 
Jesmond Miranda Residential Aged Care, Miranda 
NSW 
sabitrikali66@gmail.com
